MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel, Request For Protective Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Bernadette D. Bantly, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Arthur Walter Curley
Waukeen Q. McCoy, Esq. and Spencer Smith, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Hossein Kajouee

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Hossein Kajouee's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and attendance at deposition.
Request for production.
Granted in part, denied in part. With the exception of request #60, the motion is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to provide verified responses and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. If any documents are withheld based on either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege, they shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log.

Protective order: deposition.
Granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to reschedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition of plaintiff shall be completed no later than July 30, 2007. The depositions of defendant shall not take place until after the completion of plaintiff's deposition.

Monetary Sanctions.
Granted. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted non-meritorious objections and made evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Set For Trial On Jan-07-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-20-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 622
